---
title: Man's Search For Meaning
author: Viktor E Frankl
date: '2025-10-31'
categories:
- Psychology
- Book
image: cover.jpg
subtitle: ★★★★ | The classic tribute to hope from the Holocaust
rating: 4
body-class: project-detail-view
include-before-body:
  text: '<div style=''margin-top: 50px;''></div>'
---


<style>
  #quarto-margin-sidebar {
    padding-top: 50px;
  }
</style>

# Man's Search For Meaning

## Reading Journey

- 2025-10-31: Finished
